differentials.name: Sarcoma
differentials.raw: Sarcoma (chondro-, osteo-, soft-tissue sarcoma, especially rhabdomyosarcoma in children)

differentials.name: Salivary gland malignancy: mucoepidermoid carcinoma, adenoid cystic carcinoma
differentials.raw: Salivary gland malignancy: mucoepidermoid carcinoma, adenoid cystic carcinoma

differentials.name: check for extension to pterygopalatine fossa + infraorbital fissure into orbit
differentials.raw: check for extension to pterygopalatine fossa + infraorbital fissure into orbit

context: √  infiltrating mass with mandibular destruction √  tubular mass along cranial nerve V3 √  extending from pharyngeal mucosa √  extending from parotid gland N.B.: (1) check course of V3 to foramen ovale for skull base extension to Meckel cave area + cavernous sinus
